title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at BEL Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at BEL Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
BEL Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BEL Ventures Solutions:
BEL Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BEL Ventures Solutions!
